title: M&G GLUE STICK 21G ( USTIC )
subtitle: M&G GLUE STICK 21G
overview: Our M&G USTIC Glue Stick 21G is an excellent choice for anyone looking for an economical, strong, and non-toxic adhesive. Whether you're working on a school project or a DIY home improvement task,  USTIC will help you get the job done right.

title: M&G GLUE DOT TAPE ( 8MM X 8.4MM )
subtitle: M&G GLUE DOT TAPE
overview: Our M&G glue dot tape is a double-sided adhesive that offers instant adhesion, making it a fast and easy way to bond materials together without any mess or waste. Its smooth operation ensures neat application, while its easy removal with an eraser ensures no damage to the surfaces. With its precise and clean application, glue dot tape provides a reliable solution for all your adhesive needs.

title: M&G WHITE GLUE 120G
subtitle: M&G WHITE GLUE 120G
overview: Looking for a versatile and reliable adhesive that can handle any project? Look no further than M&G White Glue! Our specially-formulated adhesive is perfect for bonding a variety of materials, including paper, fibres, leather, plastic, wood, and more. With its quick-drying formula, you won't have to wait long for your project to come together, and best of all, there's no messy residue to clean up afterwards. Plus, M&G White Glue is built to last, with waterproof and durable properties that make it perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. And you can feel good about using our glue, too - it's non-toxic, environmentally friendly, and won't harm your health or the environment. Whether you're a student, office worker, or DIY enthusiast, our M&G White Glue is an essential addition to your toolkit. Try it today and experience the difference for yourself!

title: M&G LIQUID GLUE 50ML
subtitle: M&G LIQUID GLUE 50ML
overview: Our M&G liquid glue 50ml is a type of adhesive that is smooth and spreads evenly, making it easy to apply and stick. It has a strong adhesive property that ensures that the glued surfaces remain bonded for a long time. This type of glue is commonly used for paper and cardboard crafts, as well as for household repairs and DIY projects.

title: M&G GLUE STICK 8G ( SUPER STRONG ) ( PVP )
subtitle: M&G GLUE STICK 8G
overview: Made from PVP, our M&G Glue Stick 8G is super strong and will securely bond any material you need. It's non-toxic, acid-free, and washable, making it safe for children to use and easy to clean up.
